news.headline: REV Group sells off its transit bus business, ElDorado National for $52 million, plans to pay down ABL facility debt.
news.summary: Headquartered in Brookfield, Wisconsin, REV Group, Inc. (NYSE: REVG), a top manufacturer of specialty vehicles, revealed its decision to cease bus manufacturing operations. The company has officially sold ElDorado National (California), Inc. (ENC) to Rivaz, Inc. for around $52 million. The net proceeds from this sale will be utilized to reduce the outstanding debts under REV Group's ABL credit facility. This move marks a significant shift in REV Group's business strategy, as it aims to focus on other segments moving forward.

news.headline: Colabor Group (TSX: GCL) renews supply agreement with institutional customer.
news.summary: In Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Quebec on October 18, 2024, Colabor Group Inc. (TSX: GCL) disclosed the renewal of a supply contract with an institutional client. The agreement signifies a continued partnership between Colabor and the customer ensuring a seamless supply chain.

news.headline: China.org.cn presents video story on Quzhou County's transformation from barren to fertile land, showcasing resilience and international cooperation in Hebei Province, Beijing, on Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: In a video report released by China.org.cn on October 18, 2024, the transformation of Quzhou County in Hebei Province is showcased, demonstrating the remarkable shift from desolate landscapes to productive farmland. The story highlights the resilience of the local community and emphasizes the significance of global collaboration in achieving this feat. Quzhou County, once plagued by extreme conditions, has now become a symbol of rejuvenation, illustrating the potential for positive change. This inspiring journey underscores the importance of international partnerships in overcoming challenges and fostering sustainable development.

news.headline: ICZOOM's subsidiary, Hjet Supply Chain Co., Ltd., ranked 390th in Shenzhen Top 500 Enterprises in 2024.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on October 18, 2024, ICZOOM Group Inc. (Nasdaq: IZM), a company specializing in B2B electronic component products e-commerce, revealed that its subsidiary, Hjet Supply Chain Co., Ltd., was positioned at the 390th spot in the Shenzhen Top 500 Enterprises for the year 2024.

news.headline: Neurophet in Seoul to host Symposium with Alzheimer's expert Stephen Salloway. Discussing brain image analysis for treatments.
news.summary: Neurophet invited renowned scientific advisor Stephen Salloway, a Neurology professor at Brown Medical School, as a guest speaker in SEOUL, South Korea on Oct. 18. Salloway discussed cutting-edge brain image analysis techniques for prescribing Alzheimer's disease treatments like 'Leqembi' and 'Kisunla'. The event attracted a large audience to learn from Salloway's expertise in this field.

news.headline: LeasePoint secures $40M funding from Altriarch Asset Management in Austin.
news.summary: Austin, Texas - On October 18, 2024, LeasePoint Funding Group, LLC revealed the acquisition of $40 million in additional funding from Altriarch Asset Management. Westlake Securities, an Investment Bank in Austin, facilitated the transaction.

news.headline: 91% of insurance execs view climate risk as a threat, highlights the importance of managing impacts in the industry.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut, on October 18, 2024, the significance of evaluating and handling the risks associated with climate change has grown significantly within the insurance sector. The potential consequences of climate change encompass a variety of issues, such as extreme weather occurrences and alterations in...

news.headline: Revolve Group, Inc. will reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024, following a market close announcement.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 18, 2024, Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV) revealed plans to unveil their financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The announcement mentioned that the results will be made public after the market closes on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. A subsequent conference call is scheduled for 1:30 PM (PT) / 4:30 PM on the same day to discuss these financial outcomes.

news.headline: KCI Technologies Inc. acquires McLaren Engineering Group, a New Jersey-based full-service engineering firm.
news.summary: In Sparks, Maryland on October 18, 2024, KCI Technologies Inc., a diversified engineering, consulting, and construction company with a nationwide presence, has successfully acquired McLaren Engineering Group, a comprehensive engineering firm based in New Jersey. This acquisition marks a significant development for KCI Technologies Inc. as it expands its capabilities and reach.

news.headline: Katherine Keefe appointed as Global Cyber Insurance Industry Lead by Kroll, a global risk solutions provider.
news.summary: Kroll, a prominent provider of global risk and financial advisory services, revealed on October 18, 2024, that Katherine Keefe is set to join the company as the Managing Director and Global Cyber Insurance Industry Lead. This move marks a significant development for Kroll's cyber insurance division, signaling a strong push towards enhancing their presence in this sector. Keefe's appointment is expected to bring a wealth of experience and expertise to the team, further solidifying Kroll's position in the cyber insurance market. This strategic decision underscores Kroll's commitment to bolstering its capabilities in the ever-evolving realm of cybersecurity and financial protection.

news.headline: Marriott signs deal to bring Luxury Collection & AC Hotels to Shenzhen, China. Agreement with Shum Yip Holdings.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 18, 2024, Marriott International, Inc. revealed a new agreement with Shum Yip Holdings Company Limited. The partnership aims to bring The Luxury Collection and AC Hotels by Marriott to Shenzhen, a key city in southern China. This move is anticipated to enhance the city's hospitality offerings. Stay tuned for further updates on the opening of these prestigious hotels.

news.headline: Bonobos and Toys"R"Us collaborate on '1988 Geoffrey the Giraffe' collection to celebrate his birthday.
news.summary: A collaboration between a renowned men's fashion brand and a popular toy brand has resulted in the launch of a special '1988 Geoffrey the Giraffe' collection to commemorate his birthday. The fashion brand involved is Bonobos, recognized for its unique styles. This limited edition collection is set to be released in New York on October 18, 2024.

news.headline: Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Co. sues Canna Global Acquisition Corp, CEO, & counsel for not buying back 724,000 common shares.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Canna Global Acquisition Corporation announced its decision to terminate and liquidate the trust established under its IMTA. Despite repeated requests, Canna failed to purchase and cancel 724,000 shares of Class A common shares. This development signifies a significant event in the company's financial operations.

news.headline: Olight starts charity campaigns for breast cancer awareness and hurricane relief with global support.
news.summary: In Lorton, Virginia on October 18, 2024, Olight, a company striving to excel in mid-to-high-end flashlights worldwide, launched charity programs to aid breast cancer awareness and hurricane disaster relief. Throughout this initiative, all...

news.headline: Narwal introduces S20 Pro cordless vacuum mop cleaner to revolutionize smart home tech with advanced features.
news.summary: Narwal, a renowned brand in the smart home cleaning industry, has recently unveiled their latest home cleaning device, the Narwal S20 Pro in New York on October 18, 2024. This upgraded cleaning solution boasts advanced features and intuitive capabilities, solidifying Narwal's reputation as a global leader in this sector. The new device is expected to revolutionize home cleaning with its cutting-edge technology and is already gaining significant attention from consumers.

news.headline: PharmaLogic opens new radiopharmaceutical facility in Salt Lake City. Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: In Murray, Utah on October 18, 2024, PharmaLogic Holdings Corp., a leading contract development and manufacturing organization and radiopharmacy solutions provider, revealed the launch of its radiopharmaceutical production facility.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer provides compliance guidance for startups on Beneficial Ownership Filing Requirements under the Corporate Transparency Act.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, as the deadline approaches for the Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) reporting rule under the Corporate Transparency Act, startups are seeking clarity on eligibility and compliance. Wolters Kluwer CT Corporation has introduced resources to assist with BOI-related questions, such as expert insights and a podcast. These tools aim to improve understanding among startups regarding their reporting obligations. The deadline is year-end, and this initiative is crucial for businesses navigating the CTA. This effort supports transparency and compliance among a variety of startup entities, fostering a better grasp of the requirements.

news.headline: FIS partners with Fulham FC to launch innovation space at new Fulham Pier in London, overlooking Thames River.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, FIS (NYSE: FIS), a global financial technology company, has partnered with Fulham Football Club to introduce the Markers, presented by FIS. This collaboration has led to the creation of a cutting-edge innovation space and technology hub at the new Fulham Pier. Situated as part of Fulham's riverside stand redevelopment, the Pier is London's latest riverfront attraction offering amenities like restaurants, cafes, a hotel, spa, and members' club all with a view of the Thames. This partnership signifies a significant development in both the technology and entertainment sectors, blending modern technology with traditional leisure offerings for visitors to enjoy.

news.headline: Ashling Partners acquires Reveal Group to expand automation solutions, enhancing Multimodal services.
news.summary: Ashling Partners, a prominent global provider of Intelligent Automation and digital transformation services, has recently acquired Reveal Group in an exciting move announced on October 18, 2024. This acquisition marks a significant advancement in Ashling Partners' mission to strengthen its Multimodal solutions.

news.headline: Income Financial Trust announces $0.06642 per unit monthly distribution, payable on November 8, 2024 to unit holders as of October 31, 2024.
news.summary: Toronto-based company, Income Financial Trust, announces a monthly distribution of $0.06642 per unit on October 18, 2024. Unit holders as of October 31, 2024, will receive the distribution on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: illycaffè partners with Art Basel Paris, offering visitors its coffee at all refreshment points, and unveiling a new art collection by four designers. PARIS, Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: During the upcoming fair, all attendees will have the opportunity to enjoy illy coffee at various refreshment areas. They can also explore the latest illy Art Collection created by Monica Bonvicini, Binta Diaw, Simone Fattal, and Shirin Neshat. The event is scheduled to take place in Paris starting on October 18, 2024. Illycaffè, a well-known global coffee company, will showcase these offerings at the fair, providing a unique experience for visitors.

news.headline: Quadravest Preferred Split Share ETF raises distribution by 7.7% to $0.70 annually, from $0.65, for monthly payout.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 18, 2024, Quadravest Capital Management Inc. disclosed a 7.7% rise in the monthly distribution for the Quadravest Preferred Split Share ETF. The distribution for the Preferred ETF has been increased from $0.65 to $0.70 annually. The Manager has also announced the declaration of a monthly distribution.

news.headline: Masimo Corp appoints Timothy Scannell and Wendy Lane to Board, with the Board now consisting of 8 directors.
news.summary: Masimo Corporation, a prominent global medical innovator listed on Nasdaq as MASI, has recently added two members to its Board of Directors, Timothy J. Scannell and Wendy E. Lane. This brings the total number of directors on the Board to eight. Quentin Koffey, the Lead Independent Director of Masimo, expressed satisfaction with the new additions, stating, "We are delighted to have Tim and Wendy join us as independent directors. Both individuals bring substantial expertise to the table."

news.headline: Vida integrates OpenAI's speech-to-speech API for emotionally expressive and multilingual conversations, setting new customer experience benchmark.
news.summary: Vida, a prominent provider of AI voice solutions for telecom providers, introduced emotionally expressive, multilingual conversations through its AI phone agents, making them one of the early platforms to offer this feature. This innovative move, launched on October 18, 2024, in Austin, Texas, has established a new standard in customer experience.

news.headline: Canadian Life Companies Split Corp. declares $0.10 monthly dividend per Class A share ($1.20 annualized) and $0.06667 per Preferred share ($0.80 annualized), payable Nov 8, 2024, to shareholders on record as at Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on Oct. 18, 2024, Canadian Life Companies Split Corp. announced its monthly distribution for shareholders. Each Class A share will receive $0.10000 ($1.20 annually) and each Preferred share will receive $0.06667 ($0.800 annually). The distributions will be paid on November 8, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: PensionPro and Finch partner to automate collection of sponsor data for TPAs, helping with timely and accurate info.
news.summary: AmericanTCS’s PensionPro, a company specializing in workflow automation software for third-party administrators (TPAs), has revealed a collaboration with Finch, a unified API platform. Through this partnership, TPAs can efficiently gather standardized payroll and census data from employers’ payroll systems. The inability to access sponsor data in a timely and consistent manner has been a persistent issue for TPAs and recordkeepers. This alliance aims to address these challenges and streamline the process.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Restaurant365 CEO Tony Smith as exceptional entrepreneur at 2024 Summit. CEO and Co-Founder recognized.
news.summary: Tony Smith, CEO and Co-Founder of Restaurant365, has been acknowledged as one of the top entrepreneurs at the 2024 Builders and Innovators Summit in Irvine, California on October 18, 2024. This recognition comes from financial powerhouse Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS). Smith's exceptional leadership and innovative approach have earned him a prestigious spot among the most notable entrepreneurs in the industry.

news.headline: M Split Corp. declares $0.03125 monthly dividend ($0.375 annually) for Class I Preferred shares, at 7.50% rate, payable on Nov 8.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, M Split Corp. announced a monthly distribution of $0.03125 per share ($0.375 annually) for Class I Preferred shareholders. The dividends for Class I Preferred shares yield an annual rate of 7.50%, calculated based on the $5 notional issue price. Shareholders on record as of October 31, 2024, will receive the distribution on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: DOE awards APS $70 million for smart grid projects for resilience, reliability, and wildfire mitigation.
news.summary: Phoenix - The U.S. Department of Energy has recently granted APS a significant $70 million for projects aimed at enhancing smart grid resilience, reliability, and wildfire mitigation.

news.headline: Frontier gets 7 grants from Connecticut to expand high-speed fiber internet access, funded by ARPA. Over 1M locations served.
news.summary: In Dallas, Frontier (NASDAQ: FYBR) announced receiving seven ConneCTed Communities grants from the Connecticut Department of Energy and Environmental Protection. The grants aim to enhance high-speed, reliable fiber internet access across Connecticut. The funding, sourced from Connecticut's allocation of the American Rescue Plan Act (ARPA) Capital Project Fund, is significant as it underscores the commitment to expanding internet connectivity. Over the past three years, Frontier has successfully provided fiber internet access to more than 1 million homes and businesses in Connecticut.

news.headline: US Financial 15 Split Corp declares $0.05883 per Preferred share, 10.00% annually, payable Nov 8, record as of Oct 31.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, US Financial 15 Split Corp announced a monthly distribution of $0.05883 per Preferred share, equivalent to 10.00% annually based on the previous month-end net asset value. The distribution will be disbursed on November 8, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Gurobi hosts Decision Intelligence Summit in Amsterdam for industry leaders from EMEAI region - 2-day event.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, a major event is set to bring together industry experts from the EMEAI region for a two-day in-person gathering. The event aims to facilitate learning and networking opportunities for participants.

news.headline: Remitly set to announce Q3 financial results on Oct. 30, 2024.
SANUWAVE plans reverse stock split, note and warrant exchange, and PIPE offering.
Results of AB Amber Grid's Extraordinary General Meeting: decisions adopted by shareholders.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The economy also saw an increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added last month. Additionally, the stock market reached record highs, with the Dow Jones breaking the 30,000 mark for the first time. Experts attribute this positive economic growth to various factors, including government stimulus packages and increased consumer spending. Overall, the latest data paints a promising picture of the country's economic recovery.

news.headline: Millicom (Tigo) plans to fully redeem the 6.625% Senior Notes maturing in 2026.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 4.2%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous quarter, where unemployment was at 5.6%. The report also highlights a 2.3% increase in average hourly wages, reaching $25.80. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, showing positive signs of recovery. These numbers indicate a strong economic momentum and a promising outlook for future job market stability.

news.headline: "Godzilla Minus One re-released in theaters on Nov 1, 2024 to honor 70th Anniversary, directed by Takashi Yamazaki."
news.summary: In honor of Godzilla's 70th Anniversary, the Academy Award-winning film "Godzilla Minus One" will return to theaters nationwide on November 1, 2024. The re-release, under the direction of Takashi Yamazaki, coincides with Godzilla Day on November 3. Tickets are currently available for both the original film and its remastered black and white version titled "Godzilla Minus One/Minus Color." This marks a special celebration for fans of the iconic monster, with the film set to be showcased in cinemas across the country.

news.headline: CMUV Bancorp reported $1,127,388 in net income for Q3 2024, $315.9 MM in total assets, $276.3 MM in deposits, and $261.1 MM in gross loans.
news.summary: In El Centro, California, on October 18, 2024, CMUV Bancorp, the parent company of Community Valley Bank (CVB), revealed unaudited 3rd Quarter outcomes for the period concluding on September 30, 2024. The Net Income for the quarter was $1,127,388, translating to $0.65 per share. As of quarter-end, Total assets peaked at $315.9 million, total deposits stood at $276.3 million, and gross loans finished the quarter at $261.1 million.

news.headline: Acme United's net sales decrease by 4% to $48.2 million in Q3 2024, but excluding certain products show a 4% increase.
news.summary: Acme United Corporation (NYSE American: ACU) based in Shelton, Conn., reported a 4% decrease in net sales for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, with sales totaling $48.2 million compared to $50.4 million in the third quarter of 2023. Excluding the impact of the Camillus and Cuda product lines sold in November 2023, net sales for Q3 2024 actually increased by 4% compared to Q3 2023. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, net sales were $148.5 million, showing a 1% decline from the same period in 2023 when sales were $149.6 million. Excluding Camillus and Cuda, net sales for the nine-month period increased by 5% compared to 2023.

news.headline: Roadzen to showcase at ThinkEquity Investor Conference on Oct 30, 2024.
Veeco (NASDAQ: VECO) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 6 after market close, conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: Veeco Instruments Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VECO, is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on November 6, 2024. The report will be made public after the market closes on that day. Following the release, a conference call is scheduled to take place at 5:00 PM Eastern Time for the company to discuss and analyze the results.

news.headline: HMS Networks sells all shares in Red Lion Europe GmbH in Germany. Division complete.
news.summary: Today, HMS Industrial Networks GmbH, which is a wholly owned subsidiary of the HMS Networks AB (publ) group, has successfully sold all shares in Red Lion Europe GmbH, a company based in Dinkelsbühl, Germany.

news.headline: Global oleochemicals market to reach $54.43 billion by 2031, with a 6.3% CAGR. Rising demand for sustainable products and green alternatives drives growth.
news.summary: In Westford, US, the global oleochemicals market is projected to reach a value of USD 54.43 Billion by 2031, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.3% during the forecast period from 2024 to 2031, according to SkyQuest. This significant growth is attributed to the increasing demand for biodegradable and sustainable products, as well as stringent regulations on petrochemical derivatives. The market is also benefitting from the shift towards eco-friendly alternatives and advancements in product applications. Additionally, the rise in demand for chemicals from the food & beverages industry is contributing to the market expansion. The comprehensive "Oleochemicals Market" report encompass 197 pages, 95 tables, and 76 figures. In 2023, the market revenue was recorded at $35.43 Billion, and it is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.3% to reach $54.43 Billion by 2031.

news.headline: Dividend Select 15 Corp. announces monthly dividend of $0.05442 per equity share, payable on Nov 8 to shareholders on record by Oct 31.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Dividend Select 15 Corp. announced a monthly distribution of $0.05442 per Equity share. Shareholders as of October 31, 2024, will receive the payment on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: Prime Dividend Corp. declares $0.05992 monthly distribution for Class A shares and $0.06667 for Preferred shares on Oct. 18, payable Nov. 8 to shareholders on record as of Oct. 31.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 18, 2024, Prime Dividend Corp. announced its monthly distribution for shareholders. The company will be distributing $0.05992 per Class A share and $0.06667 per Preferred share. Shareholders as of October 31, 2024, will receive these distributions on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: North American Financial 15 Split Corp. declares $0.11335 monthly dividend per Class A share ($1.3602 annually) and $0.07917 per Preferred share ($0.950 annually). Payable on November 8 to shareholders on record as of October 31.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 18, 2024, the North American Financial 15 Split Corp announced its standard monthly dividends. Each Class A share will receive $0.11335 per share monthly ($1.3602 annually), while Preferred shares will get $0.07917 per share monthly ($0.950 annually). The dividends will be distributed on November 8, 2024, to shareholders recorded as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Dividend 15 Split Corp. announces monthly dividends: $0.10 per Class A share ($1.20 annually) and $0.04583 per Preferred share ($0.55 annually). Payable on Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Dividend 15 Split Corp. announced its monthly distribution rates. Each Class A share will receive $0.10000 per month ($1.20 annually), and each Preferred share will receive $0.04583 per month ($0.550 annually). Shareholders as of October 31, 2024, will be eligible for these distributions, which will be paid on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: SUNMI highlights digital innovation at GITEX 2024 in Dubai for 8th year, featuring third-gen products.
news.summary: From October 14 to 18, 2024, SUNMI participated in GITEX GLOBAL 2024 in Dubai under the theme "Let's Experience BIoT Everywhere", commemorating its eighth consecutive year at the event. The exhibition featured SUNMI's latest third-generation flagship products and pioneering technologies.

news.headline: Blackwell 3D Construction Corp. targets Dubai South for 3D printing expansion projects, leveraging region's growth.
news.summary: Dubai, United Arab Emirates, October 18, 2024 - Blackwell 3D Construction Corp. (OTC: BDCC), a leading 3D house printing technology firm, has revealed its strategic shift towards Dubai South, marking it as the prime spot for upcoming ventures and collaborations. With a keen eye on expansion, Blackwell is actively seeking prospects in this vibrant, rapidly developing area, capitalizing on Dubai South’s strategic location and the UAE government’s robust endorsement of advanced construction methodologies.

news.headline: Lottery.com Inc's Chairman addresses effective Form S-1 Registration Statement with SEC; emphasizes future growth, addresses accusations.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas - On October 18, 2024, Lottery.com Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRY; LTRYW) announced that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has approved the Company's Form S-1 Registration Statement (File Number: 333-281925) effective as of October 16, 2024. Matthew McGahan, CEO and Chairman of Lottery.com, penned an open letter to shareholders following the declaration to discuss the future of the Company and respond to allegations against the Company, its directors, and executives. Lottery.com, a prominent technology firm specializing in digital lottery and sports entertainment, continues to make strides in the industry.
